title: An Act to revitalize agriculture, conditioning and simulcasting

abstracts.abstract: Senate,  January 5, 2026 -- The committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure to whom was referred the petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 234) of Paul R. Feeney for legislation to revitalize agriculture, conditioning and simulcasting, report the accompanying bill (Senate, No. 2820).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Senate Ways and Means

committee on Senate Ways and Means
